P. 1/30/2015/ffapf] efre $pp, eece effe ffree - tjpffrer errec ■'ire-N, arerrere, ree IL, re? 3, eere? (i) arff^rei eerec re. re.ff. 735 (ar) erfre 27 eerer, 2006 rere ccrffe ffre pn f afp presren arff^ere eretc re.e.ff. 152 (ar), effe 5 ref, 2009 re.re.ff. 8(ar) erfre 10 eeref, 2012 aftr re.re.ff. 32(ar) erfre 16 eeeft, 2014, cft psfrffe ff i> re{ i 610 GI/2016 (i) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Part n—Sec. 3(i)l MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, ihe 8th February, 2016 G.S.R. 148(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (g) of sub-section (2) of section 29A read with sub-section (I) of section 28D of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Chartered Accountants Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and Allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board Rules, 2006, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Chartered Accountants Procedtires of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and Allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board (Amendment) Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Chartered Accountants Procedures of Meetings of Quality Review Board, and Terms and Conditions of Service and Allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board Rules, 2006, in rule 9, in sub-rulc(2), after clause (i) (ia), the following clause shall be inserted namely:- “(ib) The Chairperson and Members nominated by the Central Government to the Board, shall not undertake any foreign tour without the prior approval of the Central Government. Whenever such a tour is proposed, the proposal should give full justification for the tour, including its purpose, necessity and the expected outcome of the tour for the consideration of the Central Government. [F. No. 1/30/2015/PI] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note:-The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide notification numBer G.S.R. 735(E), dated the 27th November, 2006 and subsequently amended vide notification number G.S.R. 152(E), dated the 5th March, 2009, G.S.R. 8(E), dated the 10th January, 2012 and G.S.R. 32(E), dated the 16th January, 2014. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
